domain: aerospace ground-support, drone hardware, RC aircraft, and UAV payload mounting parts

ideas.product_context: Multirotor inspection drone carrying a stabilized optical payload under the fuselage.
ideas.core_function: Supports a two-axis camera gimbal while mechanically filtering high-frequency motor vibration.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined forked yoke with elastomer bushing pockets, cable pass-throughs, and asymmetric mounting ears.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines nested cylindrical bushing seats, fork geometry, thin clearance gaps, filleted load paths, and non-symmetric payload offsets.

ideas.product_context: Composite RC aircraft or fixed-wing UAV requiring replaceable LED navigation lights at the wingtip.
ideas.core_function: Holds LED boards, lens hardware, and wiring while conforming to an aerodynamic wingtip profile.
ideas.likely_main_part: Contoured aluminum pod shell with internal board ledges, lens-retaining lip, and curved wing-interface flange.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires smooth aerodynamic exterior surfaces, thin-wall shell features, internal shelves, small screw bosses, and a compound curved mating face.

ideas.product_context: Industrial quadcopter using slide-in smart batteries that must be swapped rapidly in field operations.
ideas.core_function: Guides and locks a battery pack into a repeatable position while resisting vibration and crash loads.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined rail saddle with dovetail grooves, latch notch, connector alignment pocket, and tapered lead-in ramps.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests dovetail geometry, ramp transitions, precise datum surfaces, undercut-like retention profiles, and connector-clearance cutouts.

ideas.product_context: Fixed-wing UAV air-data system mounted on a nose boom or wing strut.
ideas.core_function: Clamps and aligns a pitot tube while routing heater wires and maintaining aerodynamic exposure.
ideas.likely_main_part: Small machined clamp block with split bore, wire channel, set-screw flats, and angled airframe mounting face.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes coaxial bores, split-clamp reliefs, angled datum planes, tiny fastener features, and hidden cable-routing passages.

ideas.product_context: Maintenance bench tool for holding UAV propeller hubs during torque checks and blade replacement.
ideas.core_function: Captures a propeller hub without damaging it while allowing access to central fasteners.
ideas.likely_main_part: Replaceable contoured fixture jaw with hub-radius pocket, soft-insert recesses, anti-rotation keys, and clearance scallops.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests organic contact pockets, removable insert cavities, repeated symmetry broken by tool-access cutouts, and datum-key alignment.

ideas.idea_title: UAV Payload Bay Blind-Mate Connector Carrier
ideas.product_context: Modular payload bay where cameras, radios, or sensors are swapped without manually connecting cables.
ideas.core_function: Positions electrical connectors so payload modules engage reliably during slide-in installation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined connector carrier with floating mount pockets, spring clearance wells, alignment dowel holes, and chamfered docking funnels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires precise connector datum control, floating tolerance features, repeated small pockets, alignment features, and funnel-like lead-in geometry.

ideas.product_context: Large-scale RC aircraft or small UAV with servo-actuated retractable landing gear.
ideas.core_function: Acts as the rotating structural hinge between landing strut and retract mechanism.
ideas.likely_main_part: CNC-machined trunnion block with cross-bore pivot, strut socket, stop faces, servo-link tab, and weight-relief pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines perpendicular bores, high-load fillets, hard mechanical stops, pockets near curved sockets, and compact multi-axis feature relationships.

ideas.product_context: Mapping UAV carrying a lidar unit that must remain level and isolated from frame vibration.
ideas.core_function: Provides a precision mounting interface between the airframe and a vibration-isolated lidar deck.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined deck insert with three-point leveling pads, isolation bushing cups, sensor datum pins, and recessed cable exits.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests coplanar precision pads, circular cup arrays, local datum features, cable egress cutouts, and stiffness-focused pocketing.

ideas.product_context: Autonomous drone docking station where the aircraft lands onto a charging cradle.
ideas.core_function: Guides the drone skid or landing foot into position for reliable charge-contact engagement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined funnel-shaped alignment cone with replaceable wear-strip slots, drain grooves, contact clearance window, and base fastener pattern.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires conical guide geometry, slots on sloped surfaces, drainage channels, asymmetric windows, and durable mounting-base transitions.

ideas.idea_title: UAV Antenna Mast Folding Hinge Knuckle
ideas.product_context: Long-range UAV with a folding telemetry antenna mast for transport and launch handling.
ideas.core_function: Allows the antenna mast to fold while locking rigidly in the deployed position.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined hinge knuckle with interleaved lugs, coaxial pin bore, detent-ball pocket, hard-stop shoulder, and cable groove.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests interlocking hinge lug geometry, coaxial tolerance-critical holes, detent features, stop surfaces, and routed cable relief in a compact part.
